## Trust checklist

Every analysis on The Sport Fanalyst shows its work. Before requesting review:

- [ ] **Sources** are cited (`data_sources` is filled in)
- [ ] **Methodology** is described (in the body or a linked repo/notebook)
- [ ] **Author** is named (`creator`)
- [ ] Frontmatter validates (the site build will confirm this)
